title: Matrices
description: Master transformation matrices, identity values, multiplication order, and coordinate transformations.
learningObjectives: Define matrices and identity matrix properties
Combine translation, rotation, and scaling transformations into a single matrix
Explain the importance of matrix multiplication ordering (TRS vs SRT)

sections.title: Transform Matrices and Multiplications
sections.content:
A matrix is a grid of numbers representing a linear transformation. In 3D engines, we use 4x4 homogenous matrices to encode Translation (Position), Rotation (Orientation), and Scale (Size) into a single 16-float array. 

Multiplying matrices combines their transformations. However, matrix multiplication is non-commutative: A × B ≠ B × A. The ordering is critical: in DirectX/Unreal, we use TRS (Scale first, then Rotate, then Translate). Reversing this order yields distorted results.

sections.title: Applying Matrix Transforms
